query: SELECT a.id, a.leadId, a.prestigeScore, a.summary, l.companyName, l.websiteUrl FROM audits a JOIN leads l ON a.leadId = l.id LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2N1WTErRdSjheBh.3ef00cf48eaf --database HG4Skpf2ZVYBMNGsfofSrc --execute SELECT a.id, a.leadId, a.prestigeScore, a.summary, l.companyName, l.websiteUrl FROM audits a JOIN leads l ON a.leadId = l.id LIMIT 5;

rows.summary: The website has a clean, modern design with excellent food photography and a clear 'Order Online' call-to-action (CTA). However, the critical error of displaying 'Clearwater' instead of 'Reno' severely undermines local authority and customer trust, requiring immediate correction. The UX needs improvement regarding contact information visibility.

The website is currently inaccessible, returning a critical 403 Forbidden error, which immediately halts all conversions and severely damages trust and SEO performance. While the error page itself is visually clean, the fundamental technical failure means the site is currently non-functional for potential customers.
